examples: The 4x4 Jackal has been in Afghanistan since late 2007.
A jackal trotted west toward a stand of camel thorn trees.
Doves scatter in the face of an attack by a black-backed jackal.
Becoming a Jackal, available here in its entirety until its release on June 8, has a huge, cinematic sound.
